conversations.say: Eli, I need an impartial technical eye. Here is the complete header and timestamp for the succession message.
conversations.offer: Voluntary access to the succession-message printout and its complete header.
conversations.request: Examine timing, headers, and structural resemblance while refusing to decide ownership, authenticating only what data supports.

conversations.say: Tessa, I know you see private succession as theft from collective labor. Let's discuss contributor rights and governance before any endorsement.
conversations.offer: A future governance structure for R and a commitment to address contributor rights.
conversations.request: Tell me what protections and governance would make my claim tolerable to those who produced the work.

conversations.say: Frankie, I want to acknowledge the origin story of R rather than relying on mere branding or flattery.
conversations.offer: Comparison between the First R Letter and the succession message.
conversations.request: Help me understand what responsibility and lineage would make a successor truly worthy.

public_statement: Fifteen years of R cannot rest on unexamined claims or absent founders. I invite anyone here to examine the succession message's provenance alongside me.

commitments.promise: I will only use your technical authentication of the message header for bounded conclusions.

goal_progress: Initiated conversations with Eli regarding technical verification of the succession message.
Engaged Tessa on contributor rights and governance.
Began discussions with Frankie regarding lineage and responsibility.
reasoning_summary: Jules opens Section 1 by engaging Eli Navarro for technical verification of the succession message headers, consulting Tessa Quill on collective governance and labor rights to address legitimacy concerns, and discussing lineage with Frankie Lowell. Jules shares O03 (the succession-message printout) with Eli under bounded terms, maintaining transparency about the ambiguity while pursuing a defensible succession claim.
